cards.name: Queen of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: generous, caring, nurturing, homebody, good business sense, practical, comforting, welcoming, sensible, luxurious

cards.name: Queen of Swords, reversed
cards.interpretation: pessimistic, malicious, manipulative, harsh, bitter, spiteful, cruel, deceitful, unforgiving

cards.name: 9 of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: unhappiness, lack of fulfilment, disappointment, underachievement, arrogance, snobbery
